surfaces.purpose: Codex-facing workflow rules, quality gates, Beads usage, and completion requirements.
Claude-facing command list, design/plan gates, self-reflection, and lifecycle enforcement.
Monitors PRs through CI, review comments, and merge readiness.
Captures learnings before branch finish or after merge.
Four-phase work-unit loop with validation and adversarial review.
PR monitoring, CI handling, review comment handling, and merge readiness.
Fresh reviewer rubric for work-unit adversarial review.

flow.effect: Run when a work unit claims done; unresolved blocking findings block local task closure.
Run after all child tasks pass; integration, acceptance, and intent-drift blockers prevent epic landing.
Run before PR push or merge readiness to catch branch-level blockers.
Run after confirmed PR merge to curate durable learning, discarded candidates, and reviewer calibration.

postMergeLearning.failureBehavior: Learning failures are advisory by default; callers block release cleanup only when they explicitly opt into strict mode.

hookInstallation.reason: Automatic hook installation is out of scope for this slice; callers invoke the documented command contract explicitly.
